topic: Automated and perfected data quality across the entire spec-kit knowledge surface (on-write + retroactive)

focus: KQ1 on-write validator surface and gaps
novelty: First inventory of the 38-rule validator surface mapped to the three reader jobs; central gap is shape-only gating with no content-quality checks and no refinement layer
ruledOut: DESCRIPTION_SHAPE/GRAPH_METADATA_SHAPE as sufficient quality gates: warn-only key-presence checks only

novelty: Retroactive layer is drift-focused detect-and-recommend, operator-triggered, no continuous content-quality sweep, near-zero auto-remediation
ruledOut: /doctor memory as a content-quality tool: read-only index-drift scope
existing backfills as continuous automation: one-shot manual migrations

novelty: description.json drops curated trigger_phrases/type the frontmatter carries; importance_tier/status/causal_summary are quality-soft free strings; three divergent trigger_phrase surfaces with no consistency gate
ruledOut: new metadata file/node type for enrichment
description.json keywords as the retrieval trigger surface

novelty: Embedding strips frontmatter AND flattens headings so curated signal never reaches the vector; no summary generator, no body-derived trigger phrases, no HVR/EARS linter; whole refinement tier absent
Skill surface already has benchmark+regression+graph-validate routing-quality loop the spec corpus lacks; port it with a prod-mode-@3 metric; same content-quality and on-write-gating gaps recur

Command QA is /doctor-scoped manifest integrity (mutation-class enum, >=1 trigger phrase); enforced mutation_class enum is the typed-governance pattern spec metadata lacks; recurring presence-not-quality theme is a convergence signal

Live default-ON verify-fix-verify quality loop with auto-fix exists on memory-save path (SPECKIT_QUALITY_LOOP/AUTO_FIX default TRUE), scoring triggers/anchors/budget/coherence; corrects earlier no-refinement framing; reframes program as extend-the-loop to authored surface + semantic dims

focus: KQ8 assemble tiered automated DQ program
novelty: Auto-fix already re-extracts body triggers + trims budget; consolidated four-tier reuse-first program with two keystones (A1 extend live quality loop to authored surface, B1 standing scheduled sweep) and C2 prod-mode-@3 benchmark as retrieval unblocker
ruledOut: building a new quality scorer (extend quality-loop.ts)
promoting Tier-C retrieval on external recall@K

novelty: Six safety rails: destructive budget-trim hazard on authored docs (score+suggest only), false-summary retrieval hazard, subset-not-equality consistency, corpus-sweep blast radius (dry-run/batched/git), prefix coverage confound, HVR fence-skip; measurement-honesty caution
ruledOut: silent auto-apply of content-removing fixes on authored docs

detail: 8/8 key questions answered with file:line grounding; program assembled and tiered; adversarial pass complete; newInfoRatio trend 0.90->0.30 diminishing
